changes.value:
File: swissarmyhammer-treesitter/src/unified.rs (56.1% coverage, 198/353 lines)

Uncovered functions/methods:
- Workspace::open() and open_with_config() (lines 192-217)
- write_ts_symbols_and_edges() - code-context integration (lines 496-578)
- semantic_search() - embed query + cosine similarity search (lines 690-724)
- tree_sitter_query() - execute TS query on parsed files (lines 731-750)
- semantic_search_from_records() - DB-backed search (lines 1064-1087)
- tree_sitter_query_impl() - core query execution (lines 1090-1149)
- cluster_by_similarity() and compute_cluster_similarity() (lines 935-981)

These are the main query APIs of the workspace. Testing semantic_search requires an embedding model; tree_sitter_query needs parsed ASTs. Consider integration tests with temp directories containing real source files."
Test treesitter Workspace query methods (semantic_search, tree_sitter_query, find_duplicates)
